title: Whimscape: Eating+
description:
Adds immersive eating animations to Whimscape texture pack.
Lightweight, standalone, no mod dependencies.
body:
**Whimscape: Eating+** is a standalone resource pack that adds eating and drinking animations to **vanilla food and potions**, styled to blend seamlessly with [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/whimscape).

It’s built to complement Whimscape’s aesthetic without requiring any mods — perfect for players who want immersive visuals while keeping their game vanilla-compatible.

---

### 🔧 Features
- 🍖 Eating animation for vanilla food items  
- 🧪 Drinking animation for potions and soups  
- 🎨 Styled to match Whimscape’s unique look  
- 🧵 No mod dependencies — fully standalone  
- 🎮 Works on Vanilla (`1.21.4–1.21.10`)

---

### 🎨 Credits
- **Textures by:** [Kavast](https://modrinth.com/user/Kavast) & [Epic_me](https://modrinth.com/user/Epic_me)  
- **Originally based on an unofficial addon by Epic_me**,  
  which required the Eating Animation mod and worked up to **1.21.1**  
- **This version removes that dependency and adds support for newer versions**  
- **Fixes + enhancement by:** *Saiyance* 

---

> I’m new to resource pack development and made this for personal use.  
> Sharing it in case others find it useful — feedback is always welcome!

---

### 💬 Notes
- This pack will be removed or adjusted if requested by the original authors.  
- Compatible with most other resource packs and modpacks.

---

🗨️ **Need help or want to report an issue?**
